inputs.problem_statement: Users often abandon the device onboarding flow at the Wi-Fi connection step, leading to high support ticket volume and returns.
inputs.concept_brief: A new 'Guided Wi-Fi Setup' that proactively tests signal strength and offers visual troubleshooting steps instead of a generic failure message.
assumptions: Users have their Wi-Fi password readily available.
The issue is due to unclear error states, not actual hardware failures.
